description_long: This is a fictional starfighter with a sleek, elongated fuselage and four prominent engines mounted at the rear, each paired with a laser cannon at the tip of its four wings. The wings are arranged in an X-formation, giving the craft a distinctive silhouette, and feature red and yellow markings over a primarily white and gray body. The cockpit is located at the front of the fuselage, enclosed with a transparent canopy, and appears to be designed for a single pilot. The rear of the craft shows detailed engine exhausts and mechanical components, while the underside and sides reveal additional paneling and structural details. The overall design is aerodynamic, with angular lines and a futuristic, battle-ready appearance. The asset is reminiscent of iconic science fiction vehicles, suggesting advanced technology and high maneuverability.
description: A futuristic, white and gray starfighter with four engines, X-shaped wings, and red markings, featuring a single forward cockpit and detailed mechanical features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, forward cockpit canopy, and symmetrical X-shaped wing arrangement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated fuselage, cockpit placement, and the linear alignment of the engines and laser cannons.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the four large engine exhausts, mechanical details, and the spread of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring view 1, with clear visibility of the wing and engine structure.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with four straight wings arranged in an X-formation, no visible winglets, and no pronounced dihedral or anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Four rear-mounted jet engines integrated into the wing structure.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Retractable landing gear, with main and nose gear units implied but not visibly extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a transparent canopy.
